CustomField.defaultValue: "Please follow the relevant rules below :"+ BR() + "For Tier 0 GAMs (example BNP) : AP_T0_BNP_GAM_2020" + BR() + "For Tier 0 KAMs (example BELFIUS): AP_T0_BELFIUS_KAM_2020" + BR() + "Generic Naming Convention : AP_T#_COMPANY NAME_2020"+ BR()+ "Generic Naming Convention for companies without Tier : AP_COMPANY NAME_2020"
CustomField.label: Naming Convention
